sourceRef.citation: Dr. Abdul Rahim Changezi,Dr. Mohammad Yousuf,Mamoon Khan et al. 2026

statement.en: AURAT MARCH: PERSPECTIVES, PROSPECTS AND PROPOSALS CASE STUDY OF BALOCHISTAN

proposer: Dr. Abdul Rahim Changezi,Dr. Mohammad Yousuf,Mamoon Khan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a social science case study on women's activism and regional politics in Balochistan. It is a descriptive/analytical work presenting perspectives and proposals rather than making falsifiable empirical claims or formal theorems. The truth-value is suspended pending domain-specific peer review in sociology, gender studies, and regional studies—not directly evaluable as TRUE/FALSE in formal logic.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 抑圧された声が公共空間を奪還するほど、世代を超えた抵抗は立方根的に深まる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 一つの声が地を踏みしめ、波紋が四方に広がり、地平線は揺らぎながらも立ち直る。
